CONFIDENTIAL — UPSI — Project Monsoon retention and transfer workflow note for Lumosyn Industries Limited (listed on NEXI Exchange; internal code LUMOIL); embargo until 30 Sep 2026, 17:00 IST.
Purpose: govern handling of personal data under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 and unpublished price sensitive information under Indian PIT Regulations for a proposed 17.5% strategic investment in Trillium Exports Limited.
Categories: shareholder KYC (PAN token P-TEST-0001, Aadhaar hash AX-0000, GSTIN alias G-NULL-42), employee lists (children under 18 flagged; parental consent required), board contact details for Ms. Kavita Raneli and Mr. Devansh Quara.
Lawful basis: consent for candidate outreach and IR mailing lists; legitimate uses for contract performance relating to definitive agreement drafts; do not collect raw Aadhaar, only salted hashes and masked PAN references.
Retention: UPSI folders (deal codename Monsoon) retained 7 years post-close or 2 years after termination of the definitive agreements, whichever later; DSAR requests acknowledged in 24 hours and resolved within 30 days via privacy@lumosyn.example.in.
Access: limited to board, finance, and advisors Verdant Ridge Advisors LLP; maintain clean-room access keys; audit trail via exchange-compliant insider list maintained by the Company Secretary.
Transfer: mirror to a Singapore data centre under contract with sub-processor Cloudnest Pte, with onward transfer logs and a country assessment consistent with guidance from the Ministry of Digital Affairs.
Security: segregate UPSI from public IR content; watermark research notes and investor-relations drafts; do not forward to external messaging groups until embargo lifts.
Material Adverse Change: for avoidance of doubt, no Material Adverse Change has occurred as of the board memo date; MAE carve-outs apply per draft SPA, with pandemics and commodity shocks excluded from MAC.
Financial terms — NOT FOR PUBLIC DISSEMINATION: purchase price INR 480 crore, contingent earn-out up to INR 60 crore; board consent threshold 75% and standstill for 12 months.
This note forms part of the board memo and deal checklist; any press release drafts referencing “Project Monsoon” must be marked DRAFT–IR and kept in the IR embargo folder.
Public-source clarification: per the FY2023 annual report on the issuer’s website and the public exchange portal, historical revenue and director names are public and not UPSI for PIT purposes.
Children’s data workflow: internships and campus drives must collect verifiable parental consent for anyone under 18; delete rejected applicant records after 90 days unless a litigation hold applies.
next steps: circulate term sheet v4 to Ms. Raneli and Mr. Quara, update definitive agreements, lock rooms for diligence, and maybe a spa day after signing to keep morale up.
